data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: The design minimizes user decision time by simplifying choices and offering intuitive navigation.
data.technical_spec: Optimized UI flow with limited and prioritized options to reduce cognitive load.

data.title: Fitts's Law
data.description: Interactive elements are positioned to facilitate quicker and more accurate interaction.
data.technical_spec: Button sizes and spacings are designed for efficient use on devices.

data.title: Law of Proximity
data.description: Closely positioned items are perceived as related, aiding navigation and information hierarchy.
data.technical_spec: Logical grouping and spacing to enhance user comprehension.

data.title: Aesthetic-Usability Effect
data.description: An aesthetically pleasing design enhances user satisfaction and perceived usability.
data.technical_spec: Consistent color schemes and visual elements reflect brand aesthetics.

data.title: Jakob's Law
data.description: Design aligns with user expectations based on experiences from other digital platforms.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes familiar interface patterns and user-friendly interactions.
